metadata.reasoning_chain: ["Step 1: A U-shaped tunnel valley structure is visible in the seismic data, consistent with geomorphologies formed by subglacial meltwater.", "Step 2: Tunnel valleys are typically generated by pressurized meltwater eroding channels beneath glacial ice, which aligns with the structural evidence in this figure."]
